notes: The file's main technical content is a PerfectField-free proof of relNorm P = comap P at inertiaDeg 1 (Silverman III.4.10(a)), going through a module-length route via Smith normal form rather than the Galois-closure route that mathlib's Ideal.relNorm_eq_pow_of_isMaximal uses. The file also builds symmetric ClassGroup.relNorm and ClassGroup.map monoid homs and proves their dual composition relation ClassGroup.relNorm_comp_map (the class-group shadow of alpha-hat ∘ alpha = [deg alpha]). Several declarations near the end (relNorm_one, relNorm_mul, map_one, map_mul, relNorm_comp_map_eq) are sanity checks with trivial proofs and no in-file consumers.
